# vendor/guide-kit (generated)

Generated by `packages/guide-kit` sync — **do not edit**.
Edit the source in `packages/guide-kit` and re-run `npm run sync` (from packages/guide-kit).

This is a vendored copy of `@throughline/guide-kit` so this guide builds standalone
(its CI runs `npm ci` on just this repo, where the sibling `packages/guide-kit` does
not exist). The guide's package.json depends on it via `file:./vendor/guide-kit`.
